creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fluffy
Date: Tue Apr 28 13:35:55 UTC 2020
New revision: 533249
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/533249

Log:
  x11-fonts/nerd-fonts: update to 2.1.0 release

  New fonts in package:
  - IBM Plex
  - iA Writer (patched as iM Writing)
  - Agave
  - DaddyTimeMono
  - Victor Mono
  - Cascadia Code (patched as Caskaydia Cove)
  - JetBrains Mono

  sort -V plist

  PR:		245993
  Submitted by:	fluffy
  Approved by:	Greg Fitzgerald (maintainer)
  Relnotes:	https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/blob/v2.1.0/changelog.md

Changes:
  head/x11-fonts/nerd-fonts/Makefile
  head/x11-fonts/nerd-fonts/distinfo
  head/x11-fonts/nerd-fonts/pkg-plist
